source_intake_record.raw_question_text: <image>Find the area of the triangle. Round to the nearest hundredth.

issues: metadata.image_paths contains only PIL object representations rather than concrete image paths or URLs

image_dependency: question_text only says 'Find the area of the triangle' and provides no usable measurements in text
multi_step: computing a triangle's area usually requires extracting geometric values from the image and applying an area formula
the rounding instruction adds a small additional step
question_text is very short and does not expose the actual givens, so the full reasoning depth is uncertain
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single value '23.39'
question_text specifies rounding to the nearest hundredth, giving a clear target format
answer_manifest indicates the answer is present

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains only PIL object representations rather than concrete image paths or URLs
question text omits the geometric givens, so reasoning complexity is hard to judge without inspecting the image
